steps.title: Identify the defining claim about uniqueness
steps.content: The notes explicitly highlight one fact that sets Taylor apart: “her book was the only Civil War memoir to be published by a Black woman.” This statement directly captures what makes her accomplishment remarkable and unprecedented.

steps.title: Select the choice that emphasizes this uniqueness
steps.content: Choice D—“Taylor was the only Black woman to publish a Civil War memoir”—directly restates the defining claim about uniqueness from the notes. Choices A, B, and C provide contextual details—her escape, her service, and her book's current availability—but none directly address what made her accomplishment unprecedented. That matches choice D — D is correct.
